name_cn:
『PRADA Prada』
Prada New Arrival Crocodile Calfskin This Prada is more than just a little cool, you'll be captivated in minutes! The cool guy bag you pick at first glance, pure black leather accented with silver small punk style, the hot girl has it. Model: 1BD750
